response: Neighborhood enrichment analysis requires cell type annotations in slice 0. Since this is spot-level data, direct cell type annotations are not available. Please first perform cell type deconvolution or annotation using appropriate methods (e.g., 'Annotate cell types in slice 0' or 'Perform deconvolution on slice 0'), then retry the neighborhood enrichment analysis.
query_text: Test whether cell types co-localize spatially in this tissue.
